message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Project - Staff - Update
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle rectangle
skinparam lifelineStrategy nosolid
skinparam responseMessageBelowArrow true
skinparam responseMessageFontColor black
skinparam responseMessageBorderColor black
skinparam responseMessageBackgroundColor #98FB98
skinparam participantFontColor black
skinparam participantBorderColor black
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #FF6347
skinparam participantPadding 5
skinparam boxPadding 5
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam noteBorderColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #98FB98
skinparam notePadding 5
skinparam arrowColor black
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam arrowFontColor black
skinparam arrowFontName Arial
skinparam arrowFontSize 10
skinparam arrowFontStyle plain
skinparam arrowTextAlign center
skinparam arrowTextPadding 5
skinparam arrowTextBackgroundColor white
skinparam arrowTextBorderColor black
skinparam arrowTextBorderThickness 1
skinparam arrowTextBorderRadius 0
skinparam arrowTextBorderStyle solid
skinparam arrowTextBorderDashArray
skinparam arrowTextBorderDashOffset
skinparam arrowTextBorderLineCap
skinparam arrowTextBorderLineJoin
skinparam arrowTextBorderMiterLimit
skinparam arrowTextBorderOpacity
skinparam arrowTextBorderWidth
skinparam arrowTextBorderHeight
skinparam arrowTextBorderMargin
skinparam arrowTextBorderPadding
skinparam arrowTextBorderSpacing
skinparam arrowTextBorderCollapse
skinparam arrowTextBorderVisibility
skinparam arrowTextBorderDisplay
skinparam arrowTextBorderPosition
skinparam arrowTextBorderZIndex
skinparam arrowTextBorderClip
skinparam arrowTextBorderOverflow
skinparam arrowTextBorderWhiteSpace
skinparam arrowTextBorderWordWrap
skinparam arrowTextBorderWordBreak
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextOverflow
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextAlign
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextDecoration
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTransform
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextIndent
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextShadow
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextStroke
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextFill
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextOpacity
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextVisibility
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextDisplay
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextPosition
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextZIndex
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextClip
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextOverflow
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextWhiteSpace
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextWordWrap
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextWordBreak
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextOverflow
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextAlign
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextDecoration
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextTransform
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextIndent
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextShadow
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextStroke
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextFill
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextOpacity
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextVisibility
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextDisplay
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextPosition
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextZIndex
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextClip
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextOverflow
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextWhiteSpace
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextWordWrap
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextWordBreak
skinparam arrowTextBorderTextTextTextOverflow

actor Client
participant ProjectService
participant RedisCache
participant Kafka
participant PersisterService
participant IndexerService
participant ErrorService
participant ElasticSearch
database Database

Client -> ProjectService: /project/staff/v1/_update
activate ProjectService
ProjectService -> ProjectService: Validate request body
deactivate ProjectService

alt request validation fails
    ProjectService -> ProjectService: Request validation failed
    ProjectService -> Client: Error Code: REQUEST_VALIDATION_FAILED
    note right of Client: HttpStatus: 400 with appropriate error code
else
    ProjectService -> ProjectService: Request validation successful
    alt record doesn't exist
        ProjectService -> RedisCache: Search record based on serverGeneratedId
        activate RedisCache
        RedisCache --> ProjectService: 0 rows
        deactivate RedisCache
        ProjectService -> Database: Search record based on serverGeneratedId
        activate Database
        Database --> ProjectService: 0 row
        deactivate Database
        ProjectService -> Client: Error Code: RECORD_NOT_FOUND
        note right of Client: HttpStatus: 400 with appropriate error code
    else
        alt record doesn't exists in cache
            ProjectService -> RedisCache: Search record based on serverGeneratedId
            activate RedisCache
            RedisCache --> ProjectService: 0 rows
            deactivate RedisCache
            ProjectService -> Database: Search record based on serverGeneratedId
            activate Database
            Database --> ProjectService: 1 row
            deactivate Database
            ProjectService -> RedisCache: 1 record
            activate RedisCache
            RedisCache --> ProjectService: 1 row
            deactivate RedisCache
        end
        ProjectService -> RedisCache: Fetch the existing record
        activate RedisCache
        RedisCache --> ProjectService: 1 row
        deactivate RedisCache
        alt incorrect rowVersion
            ProjectService -> ProjectService: Compare rowVersion between request and db
            ProjectService -> ProjectService: Incorrect rowVersion [request: should be +1 only]
            ProjectService -> Client: Error Code: BAD_REQUEST
            note right of Client: HttpStatus: 400 with appropriate error code
        else
            ProjectService -> ProjectService: Compare rowVersion between request and db
            ProjectService -> ProjectService: rowVersion in request = rowVersion in db + 1
            ProjectService -> Kafka: Project Staff Data /update_topic
            activate Kafka
            ProjectService -> RedisCache: Update new record in cache against serverGeneratedId
            activate RedisCache
            RedisCache --> ProjectService: 
            deactivate RedisCache
            ProjectService -> Client: HttpStatus: 202 ACCEPTED
            deactivate ProjectService
            deactivate Kafka
            async
                Kafka -> PersisterService: Consume Project Staff Data
                activate PersisterService
                PersisterService -> PersisterService: Store Project Staff Data
                deactivate PersisterService
                Kafka -> IndexerService: Consume Project Staff Data
                activate IndexerService
                IndexerService -> ElasticSearch: Update Project Staff Data
                activate ElasticSearch
                ElasticSearch --> IndexerService: 
                deactivate ElasticSearch
                deactivate IndexerService
            end async
        end
    end
end
@enduml
```
